title: MBT Energy
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/mibet-energy/357309481 Xiamen Mibet New Energy Co., Ltd., is a high-tech enterprise based in China that specializes in one-stop solar mounting solutions and PV racking systems.The company manufactures a comprehensive range of structures for ground, rooftop, floating, tracking, carport, and agricultural solar applications. Holding over 200 global patents and an annual production capacity of 20GW+, Mibet exports its internationally certified products to more than 100 countries worldwide
